site.title: Atmaram Child Care and Critical Care

hero.headline: Quality Care for Every Child and Family

sections.appointmentCtaDesc: Our team is here to help. Request an appointment today.

intro.heading: Caring for Kanpur Since Day One
intro.body: Atmaram Child Care and Critical Care is a 90-bed super-specialty hospital in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh. Empanelled under Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY, we provide accessible, high-quality care to every patient who walks through our doors.

mission.heading: Our Mission
mission.body: To provide compassionate, evidence-based medical care to children and families in Kanpur and the surrounding region, with a special commitment to serving patients covered under Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY.

values.careDesc: Every decision centers on patient outcomes and family wellbeing.
values.safetyDesc: Rigorous protocols and trained staff at every level of care.
values.communityDesc: Serving Kanpur families with transparency and compassion.

paediatrics.name: Paediatrics & Neonatology
paediatrics.description: Comprehensive care for newborns, infants, and children up to 18 years.

paediatricSurgery.name: Paediatric Surgery
paediatricSurgery.description: Surgical care for children with congenital and acquired conditions.

criticalCare.name: Critical Care & ICU
criticalCare.description: 24x7 intensive care for critically ill patients with advanced life support.

generalSurgery.name: General Surgery
generalSurgery.description: Full-spectrum surgical services including laparoscopic and open procedures.

orthopaedics.name: Orthopaedics
orthopaedics.description: Treatment of bone, joint, and musculoskeletal conditions and injuries.

obstetrics.name: Obstetrics & Gynaecology
obstetrics.description: Maternal and women's health care from prenatal to postnatal and beyond.

generalMedicine.name: General Medicine
generalMedicine.description: Diagnosis and treatment of common and complex adult medical conditions.

emergency.name: Emergency & Trauma
emergency.description: Round-the-clock emergency care and trauma management for all ages.

doctors.pageSubtitle: Our team of specialists is here to help.

ayushman.heading: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY
ayushman.body: Atmaram Child Care and Critical Care is empanelled under the Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY) scheme. Eligible patients receive cashless treatment for covered procedures.
ayushman.whatIsBody: PM-JAY is India's flagship public health insurance scheme providing coverage of up to ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary hospitalisation.

address.heading: Address
address.value: Naubasta / Kidwai Nagar, Kanpur - 208021, Uttar Pradesh
